zh.lifeSummary: 當Jone Pilcher於1543年7月1日出生在英國素福爾可巴羅時，她的父親John Copsey24歲，母親Alice Ann Sheppherd21歲。她於1561年6月15日與Henry Carter在英國英格蘭素可霍沙安結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1575年之後在英國素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jone Pilcher于1543年7月1日出生在英国素福爾可巴羅时，她的父亲John Copsey24岁，母亲Alice Ann Sheppherd21岁。她于1561年6月15日与Henry Carter在英国英格兰素可霍沙安结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1575年之后在英国素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Pilcher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for a maker or seller of pilches, from an agent derivative of Pilch . In early 17th-century English, pilcher was a popular term of abuse, being confused or punningly associated with the unrelated verb pilch ‘to steal’ and with the unrelated noun pilchard, a kind of fish.

variants.name: Pilch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jozef, Pawel, Beata, Jerzy, Krzysztof, Piotr, Ryszard.

English (mainly Norfolk): from Middle English pilch, a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of pilches or a nickname for a habitual wearer of these. A pilch (from Late Latin pellicia, a derivative of pellis ‘skin, hide’) was a kind of coarse leather garment with the hair or fur still on it. See Pilcher .
Polish: nickname from Old Polish pilch ‘gray squirrel’.

variants.name: Pilger
meanings: German: variant of Pilgrim , shortened from Middle High German pilgerīm.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Jone Pilcher was born on 1 July 1543, in Barrow, Suffolk, England, her father, John Copsey, was 24 and her mother, Alice Ann Sheppherd, was 21. She married Henry Carter on 15 June 1561, in Horsham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1575, in Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jone Pilcher est née le 1 juillet 1543, à Barrow, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Copsey, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Ann Sheppherd, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Carter le 15 juin 1561, à Horsham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1575, à Suffolk, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Jone Pilcher(이)가 1543년 7월 1일 영국 수폴크 배로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Copsey(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Ann Sheppherd(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1561년 6월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 호르샤에서 Henry Carter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1575년 이후 영국 수폴크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jone Pilcher nasceu em 1 de julho de 1543, em Barrow, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Copsey, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice Ann Sheppherd, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Carter em 15 de junho de 1561, em Horsham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1575, em Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jone Pilcher родилась 1 июля 1543 г. в местности барроу, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Copsey было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Ann Sheppherd, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Carter 15 июня 1561 г. в местности хауршам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1575 г. в местности суффолк, Англия.
